iterations.theme: Ivan Bedalov's Journey from Intellectual Pride to Transformative Faith and the Power of Confession
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript represents a single, continuous testimony and closing prayer, fitting within the approximate length for one iteration and concluding naturally at the end of the podcast.
